resources.string: %1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.

string.description: Content description for a loading indicator [CHAR LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: m3_loading_indicator_content_description

resources.string: Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.

string.description: An announcement for the collapsed menu state of the trailing button in split button [CHAR LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: mtrl_button_collapsed_content_description

string.description: An announcement for the expanded menu state of the trailing button in split button [CHAR LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: mtrl_button_expanded_content_description

resources.string: Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view

string.description: a11y string to indicate this view switched the user to choosing a day [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: mtrl_picker_toggled_to_day_selection

string.description: a11y string to indicate this view switched the user to choosing a year [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: mtrl_picker_toggled_to_year_selection

string.description: Screen reader announcement for when navigation rail is collapsed [CHAR LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: nav_rail_collapsed_a11y_label

string.description: Screen reader announcement for when navigation rail is expanded [CHAR LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: nav_rail_expanded_a11y_label
